description: The Simplex Cubemap component creates a cubemap data that looks like a simplex noise texture in 3D.

fields.Background: The color for the simplex's background.
fields.Foreground: The color for the simplex's foreground.
fields.Scale: The scale of the simplex algorithm.
fields.Use4D: whether to use 4D to allow animation or shifting of the texture.
fields.WOffset: The offset of the texture in 4D.
